_comment: Voice profiles for ElevenLabs TTS. model: eleven_multilingual_v2 handles EN+FR with the same voice_id.
_voices_list: Run: node scripts/generate-audio.js --list-voices  to see available voices on your account.

foreman-gael.description: Deep, weathered, slow. Like stone that learned to speak. Calm under pressure but carrying decades of worry.

lera.description: Young, fast, warm. Finishes thoughts mid-sentence. Ha! as punctuation. Heights-born energy.

village-elder-brin.description: Elder, pragmatic, community-rooted. Plain speech. Carries authority without drama.

elder-mossa.description: Ancient, deliberate, full of silence. Speaks in images. Pauses before answering as if listening to something else.

korrim-guard.description: Terse, vigilant, flat affect. Short sentences. Not unfriendly but economical.

lix.description: Breathless, fast, exclamation-point energy. Thinks out loud. Only slows for genuine puzzlement.

scholar-eline.description: Precise, warm, scholarly. Bioluminescent Luminari — voice has a subtle depth. Thoughtful pauses.

curator-valdin.description: Meticulous, precise, evidence-driven. Bioluminescent patterns flicker when challenged. Composed authority.

curator-aosse.description: Patient, open, drawn to what doesn't fit. Spring-aspect Korrim — warmth in the voice, unhurried.
